metadata.description: SMART skill-manager ecosystem: phase-aware skill orchestration across 6 skill sources (86 installable skills incl. Anthropic official + obra/superpowers + ui-ux-pro-max design intelligence), atomic planning, persistent project memory, step-by-step execution, local code review, systematic debugging, and security auditing.

plugins.name: smart
plugins.description: Mother skill / skill manager: senses project state, detects the current phase AND the task's capability needs, then installs only the skills the moment needs — on-demand from 6 GitHub sources (this repo, anthropics/skills, obra/superpowers, ruflo, claude-plugins-official, nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill). Activate this one — it decides the rest.

plugins.name: project-planner
plugins.description: Professional project planning from zero: targeted user interview, project-size assessment (S/M/L), 13-layer checklist, and an atomic PLAN.md with acceptance criteria + verify commands per task.

plugins.name: project-memory
plugins.description: Zero-dependency persistent project memory: docs/STATE.md holds the current task, errors, bugs, decisions, and unfinished work so any agent resumes exactly where the last one stopped.

plugins.name: step-pilot
plugins.description: Step-by-step plan executor: implement -> test -> verify -> record in STATE.md -> commit. No step starts before the previous one passes its gate.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Local diff review before merge/release — no GitHub required. Five axes: correctness, readability, security smells, tests, plan conformance. Verdict with severity-sorted findings.

plugins.name: debug-detective
plugins.description: Systematic debugging: reproduce -> isolate -> hypothesize -> minimal fix -> regression test -> record the root cause in STATE.md. Stops agents from thrashing in error loops.

plugins.name: security-check
plugins.description: Pre-release security audit: leaked secrets, dependency vulnerabilities, input validation, authz/RLS, and safe defaults — with a prioritized fix list. Run before every deploy.
